basic_details.job_title: District Civil Hospital Raigad Alibag Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The District Civil Hospital Raigad Alibag has officially announced the Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates with B.Sc. Nursing or GNM qualification and a maximum age limit of 60 years can submit their offline applications on or before 17 July 2026. The recruitment is purely on a contractual basis. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are shared below.

qualification.details: Staff Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing OR GNM. Candidate must be registered in State nursing council.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Civil Hospital Raigad-Alibag Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Civil Hospital Raigad Alibag Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Overview
District Civil Hospital Raigad Alibag Staff Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the District Civil Hospital Raigad-Alibag Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download District Civil Hospital Raigad-Alibag Staff Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for District Civil Hospital Raigad-Alibag Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Civil Hospital Raigad Alibag Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Staff Nurse position is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. Nursing or GNM qualification. Additionally, they need to be registered with the State Nursing Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Staff Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Staff Nurse position is 60 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Staff Nurse position will receive a salary of Rs. 21,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, and send it along with required documents to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Staff Nurse position at District Civil Hospital Raigad-Alibag.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Staff Nurse position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the District Civil Hospital Raigad-Alibag located?
faq.answer: The District Civil Hospital Raigad-Alibag is located in Alibag, Maharashtra, with the pincode 402201.
